issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Assumes macOS/Linux environments, lacking Windows support.
Uses curl to download and pipe to bash without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Vector similarity search over document embeddings in Turso
scenarios.rationale: Baseline stores embeddings as TEXT/JSON and computes cosine in JavaScript; treatment uses the F32_BLOB(1536) column type, vector32(?) for inserts, and ORDER BY vector_distance_cos(embedding, vector32(?)).

scenarios.name: Embedded replica with atomic 2-account transfer
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for better-sqlite3 with manual BEGIN/COMMIT and no cloud sync; treatment uses createClient with url:'file:...', syncUrl, syncInterval, and db.batch([...], 'write') with parameterized args.
